author: Genshin Impact
text:
Experience #GenshinLunaVII #GenshinImpact #Nicole
I have lived through the wars, ruin, and rebuilding of Teyvat's long history. Those on the brink of being cast aside, I would strive to pull back; those on the brink of being forgotten, I would remember in earnest.
